creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
This patch makes the following changes:

-Updates lang/polyml to the latest version (in Makefile)
-Makes according changes to distinfo
-Makes according changes to files/ (creates this directory and a needed patch)
-Adds copyright information to Makefile

Fix: The included patches

--- distinfo.orig	2009-10-20 08:38:47.000000000 -0700
+++ distinfo	2010-08-16 14:24:49.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (polyml/polyml.5.2.1.tar.gz) = 303ba7d26c262999685ddd54b36dd16b
-SHA256 (polyml/polyml.5.2.1.tar.gz) = c84148ae9a28e782f48208bcb8c5b82ee7bfdc178784fe81694cf1f0789ae62e
-SIZE (polyml/polyml.5.2.1.tar.gz) = 4114551
+MD5 (polyml/polyml.5.3.tar.gz) = c4e3a33307c4465c4f068ae4fa225ced
+SHA256 (polyml/polyml.5.3.tar.gz) = 154e836f4e65b5c72f8190d3c02e5ed237921cef716cb49add1e0e1e35fb2af4
+SIZE (polyml/polyml.5.3.tar.gz) = 5289077
--- distinfo.diff ends here ---
How-To-Repeat:     Apply the patches
